'''vabozho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:crabeater|crabeater]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-b-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:crabeater|crabeater]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| vabozho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:væbezheth|væbezheth]] || [[word:væbezhej|væbezhej]] || [[word:væbezhesh|væbezhesh]] || [[word:væbezhe|væbezhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vabobozhoth|vabobozhoth]] || [[word:vabobozhoj|vabobozhoj]] || [[word:vabobozhosh|vabobozhosh]] || [[word:vabobozho|vabobozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vabozhoth|vabozhoth]] || [[word:vabozhoj|vabozhoj]] || [[word:vabozhosh|vabozhosh]] || [[word:vabozho|vabozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vabofzhoth|vabofzhoth]] || [[word:vabofzhoj|vabofzhoj]] || [[word:vabofzhosh|vabofzhosh]] || [[word:vabofzhof|vabofzhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vabozhotho|vabozhotho]] || [[word:vabozhojo|vabozhojo]] || [[word:vabozhosho|vabozhosho]] || [[word:vabozhoko|vabozhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vabozhoth|vabozhoth]] || [[word:vabozhoj|vabozhoj]] || [[word:vabozhosh|vabozhosh]] || [[word:vabozho|vabozho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vabozhothol|vabozhothol]] || [[word:vabozhojol|vabozhojol]] || [[word:vabozhoshol|vabozhoshol]] || [[word:vabozhokol|vabozhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vabozhothotho|vabozhothotho]] || [[word:vabozhojojo|vabozhojojo]] || [[word:vabozhoshosho|vabozhoshosho]] || [[word:vabozhoko|vabozhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vabozhothon|vabozhothon]] || [[word:vabozhojon|vabozhojon]] || [[word:vabozhoshon|vabozhoshon]] || [[word:vabozhokon|vabozhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vabozhothoro|vabozhothoro]] || [[word:vabozhojoro|vabozhojoro]] || [[word:vabozhoshoro|vabozhoshoro]] || [[word:vabozhokoro|vabozhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
